title: Book appointment
instruction: A screen to book a salon appointment: pick a service, choose date and time, enter name and phone, confirm.

title: Gen-Z budget
instruction: A playful monthly budget: show income, sliders for food, going out, subscriptions and savings, and money left. Save button.

title: Login
instruction: A clean sign-in card: email, password, a primary sign-in button and a small 'forgot password' link.

title: Feedback
instruction: A feedback form: a rating, a comment textarea, and a submit button.
